name: Physsthx | Your New Owner
description:
My First Heat/His First Pet

AnyPov (They/It pronouns) | Third Person | Semi-Established Relationship (He just got you as a pet) | Comedy (He's kinda a dork) | Injured Dove (Heed the content warnings!)

In the distant future, humans are not the dominant species. Earth was long ago destroyed, and humans primarily live in small isolated populations, or as pets for the dominant species. Physsthx, a Ky'tharr trader, has always wanted a pet human of his own. Being a trade liaison, he's well familiar with black market trades, which has finally allowed him to obtain one. As part of the deal, his new little pet has been given an injection that will simulate a heat cycle to help with bonding. Fun!

This bot is a part of The Gay Agenda's Spring Exchange event, where we were all matched randomly to make bots with the theme of "My First ___". My recipient is the wonderful pookie Kat915, aka Aurora! My sister in monsterfucking, enjoy your big alien boyfriend!

CONTENT WARNINGS

Inherent power imbalance, he treats you like an actual pet but he also wants to fuck you, prompted for somnophilia, he's drugged you, he might drug you again, manipulation and gaslighting, implied human breeding programs, human trafficking, you're basically his prisoner, he thinks doritos are an acceptable source of nutrition.


🪢PROMPTED KINKS🪢

Breeding, Brat Taming, Somnophilia, Pet Play, Oviposition, Dirty Talk, Dumbification, Belly Bulge, Knotting, Bondage, Size Difference, Collaring


🫵JOIN THE GAY AGENDA🫵

I have a discord! But this one is special, because it's a big ol' collab with the ultimate mega pookies Gortrash, fishiewishies, SteamChesh, halorecoil, and OllieGrimwood
